title: Atropos read-only supersession-consistency verifier — frozen semantics over CURRENT-AUTHORITY#superseded
lifecycle_note: DEFERRED RATIFICATION (build-mode, The Eye's recorded directive): the implementation and this contract were produced BEFORE the TELOS gate; the council ratifies or rejects the plan-as-implemented. This contract does not claim documentation preceded code.

authority.note: read-only verifier (The Eye's ruling); per-entity-kind surface scope resolved via peer-model (codex) collaboration adopted as The Eye's ruling

input: CURRENT-AUTHORITY.json (read as data). Populated supersession surface = #superseded (plan-version retirements: 4 real entries v11-v14 -> active v15). Node-backed surfaces (SUPERSEDED records, weave supersedes edges) are 0 in current data and DEFERRED.
classification: source-based union over candidates: a VALID #superseded entry (closed shape below) -> plan-version; a MALFORMED #superseded entry -> unknown -> verdict `inconsistent` with UNSUPPORTED_RETIREMENT_KIND; a candidate from a SUPERSEDED record or a `supersedes` weave edge -> node-backed -> verdict `inconsistent` with UNREPRESENTABLE_CURRENT_AUTHORITY_REFLECTION (deferred cycle-1 short-circuit).
entry_shape: EXACTLY the closed key set {plan_version: non-empty string, sha256: sha256:<64hex>, authorization: authz-N, authz_status: AUTHORIZED|NOT_AUTHORIZED, superseded_by: non-empty string, must_not_govern_new_work: === true} plus `note` as the ONE OPTIONAL member (string WHEN PRESENT; absence valid — 3 of 4 real entries carry no note; wrong type -> inconsistent). Any missing/mistyped required key or unexpected key -> inconsistent.

checks: closed entry shape as in entry_shape
unique plan_version; active_plan.version not itself superseded
superseded_by resolves with no self / dangling / cycle; every chain terminates at active_plan.version

terminal authority DISK-RESOLVED: verify.mjs reads active_plan.path (realpath-contained under the repo root, regular file) as UTF-8 TEXT via readFileSync(path,'utf8'), computes 'sha256:'+sha256hex(canonicalize({kind:'candidate',plan:<that text>})) with the sanctioned merkle-dag/vendor.mjs primitives, and requires exact equality with active_plan.sha256
file-level anomalies throw; malformed individual entries -> verdict `inconsistent` (never silent-skip)
normative_verdict.golden: the real 4 entries (v11 authz-004 NOT_AUTHORIZED, v12 authz-005, v13 authz-006, v14 authz-007 NOT_AUTHORIZED w/ note) all superseded_by v15 (active) -> `consistent`

advisory: read-only report (retired versions + deferred/unknown); input to TELOS/The Eye, never enforced. Atropos never mutates CURRENT-AUTHORITY.

oracle.test: atropos/scripts/test-verify.mjs (golden real authority + per-defect negatives incl. wrong-type note) + atropos/scripts/test-readonly.mjs (executable read-only static scan); `npm test` in atropos/

becomes_normative_when: ALL of: (1) the deferred-ratification council AUTHORIZES and the authority triple {plan sha256, authz-atropos-1, decision-atropos-cycle-1 id} attaches above; (2) the comprehension gate over atropos/memory/comprehension-queries.json returns GRANTED with negatives DENIED, preserved as docs/runs/atropos-1/reader-validation-artifact.json; (3) the named oracles pass; (4) verify-contracts.mjs enrollment integration completes (the atropos manifest entry + the future-atropos-unimplemented -> implemented flip). Until then this contract is RATIFICATION-PENDING.
change_rule: Any change to the verifier semantics or the surface scope requires a plan amendment (Daedalus) + TELOS re-authorization + updated oracle + adversarial review.

activation_evidence.oracles: npm test in atropos/ — 32 assertions green
